slides.heading: The Augmented LLM

points: Models generate queries, select tools, manage retention
Tailor capabilities to your use case

slides.label: Evaluator-Optimizer
slides.heading: Evaluator-Optimizer Pattern
points: One LLM generates, another evaluates in a loop
Best when evaluation criteria are clear

slides.label: Core Principles
slides.desc: Simplicity: keep agent design simple. Transparency: show planning steps. ACI Design: craft agent-computer interfaces through thorough tool docs and testing.

slides.label: Practice
slides.heading: Agents in Practice
slides.desc: Two proven domains where agents deliver measurable value.

items.label: More time on tool engineering than prompt tuning

slides.text: Build the right system, not the most sophisticated one. Start simple, add complexity only when simpler solutions fall short.
Simple, composable patterns for effective agents.
